prestazioni: Engine swap to a 4G63T (from a Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution) with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GT3076R turbo (0.82 A/R, 60mm compressor inducer) running 28psi on E85 fuel, paired with a Tomei 272° camshaft set and a custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust with a Burns Stainless 4-2-1 header and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Cusco 2-way LSD (2.5 ratio) for the rear axle, a PTT 4.3 final drive gear set, and a Tilton twin-plate clutch with a billet flywheel, mated to a Getrag V161 6-speed transmission (from a Mitsubishi Triton Ralliart) with a Quaife sequential shift kit and a PTT short shifter

Custom ECU tuning via a Haltech Elite 2500 with flex-fuel sensor, dual Bosch 028 injectors (1,600cc), and a custom intercooler setup featuring a GReddy Type-R front-mount intercooler (600x300x120mm core) with a Mishimoto silicone coupler kit and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump for auxiliary cooling
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Strada-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M matte military green wrap and blacked-out badges

Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (Strada-specific valving) with Eibach helper springs, Cusco front strut tower bar, and a PTT rear subframe brace, complemented by Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +15 ET) with Toyo R888R tires (265/35/18)

Full custom interior with Bride Zeta III seats (Strada-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel, a custom roll cage (half-cage with bolt-in door bars by Custom Cages UK), and a full carbon fiber dash overlay with a Motec C127 dash display
